blockingIssues.description: ActionCard timestamp fields and mock data values still use Date objects instead of JSON timestamp strings, so the mock shape still does not match GET /api/actions response serialization.
actions-page tests still do not import/render ActionsPage (node-only helper tests), so required component behavior assertions remain unverified.
Actions tab runtime list logic still does not enforce required ordering by priority DESC then createdAt DESC.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit exception path for declaration/static-data-only features where strict RED-first testing is not applicable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: phase2-types-and-mock-data still reports RED-first deviation while only touching shared types/mock records.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add or enforce a commit-scope rule that implementation features must not include unrelated .factory artifacts unless explicitly requested.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Commit 6e39b36 still includes unrelated .factory/docs and validation assertion files outside the feature scope.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit agent-browser validation (or a documented exemption) and accurate skillFeedback when manual UI checks are skipped.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: phase2-actions-page-ui review found no agent-browser usage while handoff indicated followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify UI testing standards: either require DOM-capable tooling for component-level assertions or explicitly allow contract-aligned logic-only tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: VAL-UI-014 expects component tests, but vitest config is node-only and current tests remain helper-only.
